sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Vitória SC has had a mixed run in their last 5 matches, with 2 wins and 3 losses, showing inconsistency in defense by conceding 7 goals. FC Arouca also struggles defensively, conceding 10 goals in their last 3 league matches, with 1 win, 1 draw, and 1 heavy loss (6-0 to Sporting). Both teams have shown vulnerability at the back, which could lead to an open game.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last 2 encounters, Vitória SC has not lost to FC Arouca, with results of a 2-2 draw and a 1-0 win. Matches between these teams often see both sides scoring and a high number of goals (over 2.5 in 6 of last 8 head-to-heads), indicating a competitive fixture.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Vitória SC averages 52% possession and creates decent chances (4 big chances in 3 games), while converting at a high rate (75%). FC Arouca matches Vitória’s offensive output with 6 goals scored in 3 games but has a worse defensive record. Vitória SC's home advantage and slightly better league position (despite fewer points) tilt the odds in their favor.

sections.subtitle: Match Dynamics
sections.text: Given the referee's tendency for high yellow cards per game (5.6) and head-to-head trends showing over 4.5 cards in most matches, expect a physical game. Corners are also likely to be high, with both teams averaging around 5 per game and past head-to-heads often exceeding 10.5 corners.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: At half-time, the scoreline stands at a 1-1 draw between Vitória SC and FC Arouca at the Dom Afonso Henriques stadium. Both teams have shown moments of promise in the first half, with goals from Gustavo Silva for the home side and Naïs Djouahra for the visitors. The match has been competitive, with both sides having their share of attacking opportunities and defensive challenges. Vitória SC has shown more intent in terms of territorial dominance, while FC Arouca has been efficient in capitalizing on their limited chances.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw a significant dominance in attacking momentum from Vitória SC for large stretches, particularly in the opening minutes and around the half-hour mark, where they consistently pushed forward with intent. Their persistent pressure paid off with a goal, showcasing their ability to create sustained attacking spells. FC Arouca, on the other hand, had notable shifts in momentum during the middle of the half, with bursts of attacking play that led to their equalizer. Towards the end of the half, momentum fluctuated, with both teams trading periods of control, indicating a tightly contested battle.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance breakdown
halftimeSections.text: Vitória SC displayed a strong presence in the final third, frequently entering dangerous areas and maintaining a balanced approach in duels. Their ability to win aerial battles and overall duels suggests a physical edge over their opponents. However, they failed to create clear-cut big chances despite their territorial advantage. FC Arouca, while less dominant in terms of possession and territory, showed clinical finishing by converting one of their limited opportunities into a goal. Their defensive structure held firm under pressure, though they struggled to win duels and lacked presence in the final third.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players to watch
halftimeSections.text: For Vitória SC, Gustavo Silva has been a standout performer, not only scoring the opening goal but also posing a constant threat with his involvement in the attack. His composure and positioning will be crucial in the second half. On the other side, Naïs Djouahra of FC Arouca made a significant impact with a well-taken header to level the score. His ability to find space in the box could trouble Vitória’s defense again. Both players are likely to play pivotal roles in determining the outcome of this match.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: Looking ahead to the second half, Vitória SC appears to have the upper hand based on their first-half dominance in key areas of the pitch. They are likely to push for a winning goal by maintaining their aggressive approach in the final third. FC Arouca will need to capitalize on counter-attacking opportunities and shore up their defense to withstand the expected pressure. The match remains finely poised, and tactical adjustments at half-time could play a decisive role. Given the patterns of play, there is a strong possibility of additional goals as both teams have shown vulnerabilities at the back.
